ddls:
CREATE TABLE "age_groups" (
  "age_group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each age group */,
  "age_range" TEXT /* Age range for the group (e.g., 0 - 3 months) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the age group */,
  "min_age_months" INTEGER /* Minimum age in months for the group */,
  "max_age_months" INTEGER /* Maximum age in months for the group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("age_group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_standards" (
  "size_standard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size standard */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region for which the size standard applies (e.g., EU, UK, US, CN) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the size standard */,
  "standard_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the standard (e.g., specific measurements, guidelines) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_standard_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shoe_sizes" (
  "shoe_size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shoe size entry */,
  "age_group_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the associated age group */,
  "size_standard_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the size standard applicable */,
  "size_value" INTEGER /* Numeric value of the shoe size */,
  "length_of_foot" REAL /* Length of foot in centimeters */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the shoe size */,
  "recommended_age_group_id" INTEGER /* Recommended age group for the shoe size */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shoe_size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shoe_sizes_size_standard_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_standard_id") REFERENCES size_standards ("size_standard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shoe_sizes_age_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("age_group_id") REFERENCES age_groups ("age_group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shoe_sizes_recommended_age_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("recommended_age_group_id") REFERENCES age_groups ("age_group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "shoe_size_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the shoe size linked to inventory */,
  "stock_level" INTEGER /* Current stock level for the shoe size */,
  "last_stock_update" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last stock update */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Stock level at which a reorder should be initiated */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the supplier */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_shoe_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("shoe_size_id") REFERENCES shoe_sizes ("shoe_size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email of the customer */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the customer (e.g., admin, retailer, consumer) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the customer */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date when the customer registered */,
  "last_purchase_date" TEXT /* Date of the last purchase */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the customer who placed the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date when the order was placed */,
  "total_amount" REAL /* Total amount for the order */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Address to which the order will be shipped */,
  "billing_address" TEXT /* Address for billing purposes */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment used */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the order this item belongs to */,
  "shoe_size_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the shoe size being ordered */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the shoe size ordered */,
  "unit_price" REAL /* Price per unit of the shoe size */,
  "discount_applied" REAL /* Discount applied to the item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_shoe_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("shoe_size_id") REFERENCES shoe_sizes ("shoe_size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shipping_details" (
  "shipping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shipping record */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the order being shipped */,
  "address" TEXT /* Shipping address for the order */,
  "shipping_date" TEXT /* Date when the order was shipped */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the order (e.g. pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  "tracking_number" TEXT /* Tracking number for the shipment */,
  "carrier" TEXT /* Carrier used for shipping */,
  "estimated_delivery_date" TEXT /* Estimated date of delivery */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shipping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shipping_details_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "returns" (
  "return_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each return request */,
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the order item being returned */,
  "return_date" TEXT /* Date of the return request */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the return */,
  "return_status" TEXT /* Current status of the return (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  "refund_amount" REAL /* Amount refunded for the return */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("return_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_returns_order_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_item_id") REFERENCES order_items ("order_item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_recommendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size recommendation */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the customer needing a recommendation */,
  "foot_length_cm" REAL /* Measured foot length in centimeters */,
  "recommended_size" INTEGER /* Recommended shoe size based on foot length */,
  "date_measured" TEXT /* Date when the foot length was measured */,
  "age_of_child_months" INTEGER /* Age of the child in months at the time of measurement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_recommendations_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the user role (e.g. admin, retailer, consumer) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON object detailing the permissions for the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
